name: 假婚姻真動心（先婚後愛）
description: 因意外救了爺爺而被迫結婚，男方一心離婚，女方本也無所謂，但在共同經歷中逐漸產生真感情。衝突核心在於兩人都嘴硬不承認。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: I'm not divorcing you only because of our years of marriage... Weird. Why is my heart beating so fast? I must have heart disease. That's not heart disease. Xiao Xiao. You like me too, right? I do. I like R Wong. What a joke. No.
examples.context: 因意外救了爺爺而被迫結婚，男方一心離婚，女方本也無所謂，但在共同經歷中逐漸產生真感情。衝突核心在於兩人都嘴硬不承認。
